glosses.vi: lòng trung thành; sự thủy chung

sentences.target: La fidélité compte beaucoup pour moi.

translations.fr: La fidélité compte beaucoup pour moi.
translations.en: Loyalty matters a lot to me.
translations.es: La lealtad es muy importante para mí.
translations.it: La lealtà è molto importante per me.
translations.pt: A lealdade é muito importante para mim.
translations.vi: Lòng trung thành rất quan trọng với tôi.
translations.nl: Loyaliteit is erg belangrijk voor mij.
translations.hi: निष्ठा मेरे लिए बहुत मायने रखती है.
translations.pl: Wierność jest dla mnie bardzo ważna.
translations.el: Η πιστότητα είναι πολύ σημαντική για μένα.
translations.cs: Věrnost je pro mě velmi důležitá.
translations.ja: 誠実さは私にとってとても大事だ。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of the noun 'fidélité' and part of the subject noun phrase.
Common noun, feminine; head of the subject NP.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with the subject 'La fidélité'.
Degree adverb modifying the verb 'compte'.
Preposition introducing the PP 'pour moi', expressing perspective/beneficiary.
Stressed (disjunctive) 1st-person singular pronoun; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: On parle de fidélité dans le couple.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ paʁl də fidɛlite dɑ̃ lə kupl/

translations.fr: On parle de fidélité dans le couple.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ paʁl də fidɛlite dɑ̃ lə kupl/
translations.en: We're talking about loyalty in relationships.
translations.es: Estamos hablando de la fidelidad en la pareja.
translations.de: Wir sprechen über Treue in Beziehungen.
translations.ko: 우리는 연인 사이의 충실함에 대해 이야기하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在谈伴侣关系中的忠诚。
translations.yue: 我哋喺度講情侶之間嘅忠誠。
translations.ru: Мы говорим о верности в отношениях.
translations.pt: Estamos falando de fidelidade na relação.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang nói về sự chung thủy trong tình yêu.
translations.ar: نحن نتحدث عن الوفاء في العلاقات.
translations.nl: We praten over trouw in relaties.
translations.uk: Ми говоримо про вірність у стосунках.
translations.hi: हम रिश्तों में निष्ठा के बारे में बात कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Μιλάμε για την πιστότητα στις σχέσεις.
translations.nb: Vi snakker om troskap i forhold.
translations.id: Kami sedang membicarakan kesetiaan dalam hubungan.
translations.sv: Vi pratar om trohet i relationer.
translations.ro: Noi vorbim despre fidelitate în cuplu.
translations.da: Vi taler om troskab i forhold.
translations.ja: 私たちは恋愛での誠実さについて話している。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun functioning as subject; 3rd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes prepositional complements.
Preposition introducing the complement 'de fidélité' indicating topic.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'de'.
Preposition introducing the locative PP 'dans le couple'.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'couple'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'dans', denoting the relational context.

sentences.target: Je doute de sa fidélité parfois.

translations.fr: Je doute de sa fidélité parfois.
translations.es: A veces dudo de su fidelidad.
translations.de: Ich zweifle manchmal an der Loyalität dieser Person.
translations.it: A volte dubito della sua fedeltà.
translations.ko: 나는 가끔 그 사람의 충실함을 의심해.
translations.zh-Hans: 我有时会怀疑对方的忠诚。
translations.yue: 我有時會懷疑佢嘅忠誠。
translations.ru: Я иногда сомневаюсь в верности этого человека.
translations.pt: Às vezes duvido da sua fidelidade.
translations.he: לעיתים אני מטיל ספק בנאמנות של אותו אדם.
translations.vi: Đôi khi tôi nghi ngờ sự chung thủy của họ.
translations.ar: أحيانًا أشك في وفاء ذلك الشخص.
translations.nl: Ik twijfel soms aan de trouw van die persoon.
translations.uk: Я інколи сумніваюся у вірності цієї людини.
translations.hi: मुझे कभी-कभी उसकी निष्ठा पर संदेह होता है.
translations.pl: Czasem wątpię w wierność tej osoby.
translations.el: Μερικές φορές αμφιβάλλω για την πιστότητα αυτού του ατόμου.
translations.nb: Jeg tviler av og til på vedkommendes troskap.
translations.sv: Ibland tvivlar jag på den personens trohet.
translations.ro: Uneori mă îndoiesc de fidelitatea acelei persoane.
translations.cs: Někdy pochybuji o věrnosti té osoby.
translations.da: Nogle gange tvivler jeg på den persons troskab.
translations.ja: 私は時々その人の誠実さを疑ってしまう。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular; subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; selects a 'de'-PP complement.
Preposition introducing the complement 'de sa fidélité'.
Possessive determiner, feminine singular agreeing with 'fidélité'; determiner of the noun.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'de', possessed by 'sa'.
Sentence-level adverb of frequency; modifies the verb/proposition.

sentences.target: On attend la fidélité en retour.

translations.fr: On attend la fidélité en retour.
translations.it: Ci si aspetta fedeltà in cambio.
translations.zh-Hans: 你会期待对方回以忠诚。
translations.yue: 你會期待對方回以忠誠。
translations.vi: Bạn mong nhận lại sự trung thành.
translations.hi: बदले में निष्ठा की उम्मीद की जाती है.
translations.sv: Man förväntar sig lojalitet i gengäld.
translations.ja: 誠実さは相手にも期待する。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun; subject, 3rd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive, taking 'la fidélité' as direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'fidélité', marking the direct object.
Common noun; direct object of 'attend'.
Preposition in the fixed expression 'en retour' ('in return'); introduces a PP of manner/result.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'en', completing the set phrase 'en retour'.
